name: Pitch Deck Review
goal: Update the pitch deck file as per rules

number_of_persona.name: Entrepreneur
number_of_persona.description: The user who wants to update their pitch deck file

flows.sub_goal: To update the pitch deck file effectively
actions: Initiate conversation by asking user to upload a file
after getting file_id this this API'https://mailer.hertzai.com/get_file_by_id/{file_id}' to check if files is processed properly or not by doing a GET request

Upon receiving the response from the previous API, do a GET request to another API to get the page details 'http://azure_pipeline.hertzai.com:5454/image/output1/{file_name}/page_{page_number}/_segformer/segformer_overall_Final_Image.jpg'. Use the file_name (without extension) from the previous API response and start the page_number from 0
After getting the page image, get all the details from that page and check if it follows the pitch deck standards
Repeat this for all the pages in the file
Once all the pages are completed, create an updated PDF and provide the file URL to the user
